# Roadmap

Generated from [`ROADMAP.md`](../../ROADMAP.md). The roadmap is the single source of truth for planned work; [`scripts/squad_bootstrap.py`](../../scripts/squad_bootstrap.py) upserts one GitHub issue per item (idempotent via the `<!-- roadmap-id: ... -->` marker) and assigns the Copilot cloud agent when an item is opted in. See [`../squad.md`](../squad.md).

## Phase 0 — Prerequisites

| id | Title | Agent eligible | Labels | Depends on |
| --- | --- | :---: | --- | --- |
| `phase0-prereqs-doc` | Phase 0: document and verify Azure prerequisites |   | `area:bootstrap`, `type:docs`, `human-only` | — |
| `phase0-state-backend` | Phase 0: stand up hardened Terraform state backend (mgmt sub) |   | `area:bootstrap`, `area:security`, `human-only` | `phase0-prereqs-doc` |

## Phase 1 — Bootstrap

| id | Title | Agent eligible | Labels | Depends on |
| --- | --- | :---: | --- | --- |
| `phase1-bootstrap-script` | Phase 1: implement bootstrap/phase1.sh idempotent provisioning |   | `area:bootstrap`, `human-only` | `phase0-state-backend` |
| `phase1-sibling-repos` | Phase 1: provision sibling repos with CODEOWNERS and protections |   | `area:bootstrap`, `area:governance`, `human-only` | `phase1-bootstrap-script` |

## Phase 2 — Pipeline

| id | Title | Agent eligible | Labels | Depends on |
| --- | --- | :---: | --- | --- |
| `phase2-validate-workflow` | Phase 2: validate workflow runs fmt/validate/tflint/checkov/conftest on every PR | ✓ | `area:ci`, `area:terraform` | `phase1-sibling-repos` |
| `phase2-plan-workflow` | Phase 2: plan workflow uploads immutable terraform plan artifact | ✓ | `area:ci`, `area:terraform` | `phase2-validate-workflow` |
| `phase2-apply-workflow` | Phase 2: apply workflow consumes saved plan artifact in protected env |   | `area:ci`, `area:security`, `human-only` | `phase2-plan-workflow` |
| `phase2-drift-detector` | Phase 2: nightly drift detector opens issues, never auto-merges | ✓ | `area:ci`, `area:operate` | `phase2-apply-workflow` |

| --- | --- | :---: | --- | --- |

| `llm-design-stage` | LLM: Design stage emits ADR and typed design.json |   | `area:orchestrator`, `area:llm`, `human-only` | `llm-interview-stage` |

| `llm-firewall-composer-stage` | LLM: Firewall Change Composer proposes RCG PRs against alz-firewall-policy/lib |   | `area:orchestrator`, `area:llm`, `area:security`, `human-only` | `phase1-sibling-repos`, `llm-design-stage` |
